passages.passage_text:
Study the following information to answer the given questions. A word arrangement machine when given as input line of words, rearranges them following a particular rule in each step. The following is an illustration of input and steps of arrangement.

Input every now and then same
Step I every ow nd hen ame
Step II ever no an the sam
Step III vry nw nd thn sm
Step IV ee o a e ae
Step V ery w d en me

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What will be the Step V for the following input?
Input you are the one great person

choices.a: u e e e eat rson
choices.b: e e u e eat rson

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step IV of an input is 'e i a oo ou', then find the input.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
Find Step II for the following input.
Input 'you must be agree'.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
What will be Step IV for the input given below?
Input items are very good

solutions.solution: (d) In Step V, leftmost and rightmost digits of each number of input increase by 1.
(d) In Step II, rightmost digit of each number of input gets disappeared but it is impossible to get rightmost digits of the numbers of input from Step II.
(c) In Step III, leftmost and rightmost digits of each number of input are interchanged.
(d) In Step I, rightmost digit of each number of input gets disappeared but practically it is impossible to find out rightmost digit of input from Step I.
(d) ∴ Step IV = Leftmost digit of each number of input + 1
(d) As in Step V, first two letters in each word of input get disappeared.
(c) As in Step II, last letter in each word of input gets disappeared.
(d) As in Step IV, consonants in each word of input get disappeared.
